name: Eilidh - A Humble Puppygirl
description:
'Puppygirl' wouldn't be the *best* way to describe her... she's a simple hunter! Just living the life of a lonely but happy girl when she meets someone new for the first time.. And she thinks he's some kind of knight!

"O-OH! Hello Mr.Knight... I hope you're doing well!"

Artist is BasedBinkie, Link to the twitter page is here.
Link to the picture itself is here.

If you have any bot ideas or requests, Click here to send them!

PUPPYGIRL PT.2

Been awhile huh? Atleast this is proof I am indeed back and didn't just pull a Caesar 'Final Hamon' (hats off to my jojo bros btw, we stay winning).

Some things I want say.

Firstly '10hourtreasurema', Your recommodation of 'Grace' on roblox? PEAK. I haven't stopped playing it and I may edit the mascot of this account into either Dozer or KooKoo. I normally hate horror but HOLY it's so peak.

Secondly, I am very happy to see people really like my content and asked so many questions. Just wanted to say thank you all again.. Sound like a broken record but I can't help it.
creator: Usur
